_comment_en_us: Example 01 is the smallest complete scene file. It demonstrates the minimum structure required for an external JSON scene: one tag definition, one scene definition, and a short operation timeline.
_comment_zh_cn: 示例 01 是最小完整场景文件。它演示了外部 JSON 场景所需的最小结构：一个标签定义、一个场景定义，以及一段很短的操作时间线。

tagDefinitions.title: JSON Tutorial Examples
tagDefinitions.description: Examples for the current 1.12.2 JSON DSL.
tagDefinitions._comment_en_us: This tag is used to group tutorial scenes into one visible category in the browser.
tagDefinitions._comment_zh_cn: 这个标签用于把教程场景归到浏览器里的同一个可见分组中。

scenes.title: Example 01: Minimal Scene
scenes._comment_en_us: The component controls which item opens this scene. componentKey is optional but useful when you want to distinguish multiple tutorials that share the same item.
scenes._comment_zh_cn: component 决定了哪个物品会打开这个场景。componentKey 不是必需的，但当同一个物品需要拆成多个教程入口时很有用。

operations._comment_en_us: Defines the logical base plate used by the preview. This affects framing and base platform size.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 定义预览中使用的逻辑底板。它会影响镜头取景和底部平台大小。

operations._comment_en_us: Scales the whole scene view. Increase it when the scene looks too small; decrease it when the scene is clipped.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 缩放整个场景视图。场景太小就增大，场景被裁切就减小。

operations._comment_en_us: Makes the base plate visible in the timeline.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 让底板在时间线上显示出来。

operations._comment_en_us: Fills a cuboid area with one block state. This is the standard way to lay down a floor or shell quickly.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 用同一种方块状态填充一个长方体区域。这是快速铺地面或搭外壳的标准写法。

operations._comment_en_us: Waits 10 ticks before the next operation. Use idle frequently so players can actually read and see transitions.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 在下一步操作前等待 10 tick。教程里应经常插入 idle，让玩家有时间阅读和观察变化。

operations._comment_en_us: Places a single block at an exact position. This is the simplest way to highlight one target block.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 在精确坐标放置一个方块。这是突出单个目标方块最直接的方式。

operations.text: This is the smallest useful JSON scene example.
operations._comment_en_us: Shows a speech-box style overlay. pointAt defines the anchor, pointMode controls where the arrow points, and placeNearTarget asks the UI to keep the text close to the target.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 显示一个气泡式文本说明。pointAt 定义锚点，pointMode 控制箭头落点，placeNearTarget 表示让文本尽量贴近目标。

operations.text: Start from this structure before adding more advanced features.
operations._comment_en_us: Draws a highlighted box around a world selection and attaches text to it. For a single block, from and to can point to the same position.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 在世界中的一个选区上绘制高亮框，并附加文字说明。若只高亮一个方块，from 和 to 可以写成同一个坐标。

operations._comment_en_us: A longer pause at the end keeps the last explanation on screen long enough for inspection.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 结尾处延长停顿，可以让最后的说明停留更久，方便观察。

operations._comment_en_us: Marks the scene as finished so the player and browser can treat it as a completed timeline.
operations._comment_zh_cn: 把场景标记为结束，方便播放器和浏览器把它视作已完成的时间线。
